description: Curated numeric OID packs for ColdAisle SNMP targets. Prefer numeric OIDs (Windows PHP SNMP). Always verify against your model/firmware.

templates.label: Custom / blank
templates.notes: Enter OIDs manually. Metric names containing watt or amp update linked PDU load.

templates.label: MIB-II system only
templates.notes: sysDescr / sysUpTime only — useful as a connectivity check. No power metrics.

templates.label: PowerShell lab agent (enterprise 99999)
templates.notes: Matches the ColdAisle PowerShell SNMPv3 test agent. simulatedAmps is Gauge ×10 (stored as amps_x10 → ÷10).

templates.label: APC UPS (PowerNet typical)
templates.notes: Common Smart-UPS / NMC OIDs. upsAdvOutputLoad is % of capacity (not watts). Active power OID varies by firmware — confirm with snmpwalk. Link PDU only if values match expected units.

templates.label: APC Rack PDU (rPDU load status)
templates.notes: PowerNet rPDU phase/bank load. Index .1 is often phase 1; amps may be in tenths on some firmware (try amps_x10 if values look 10× high). Verify model (AP88xx / AP79xx differ).

templates.label: CyberPower UPS (typical)
templates.notes: Common CPS-MIB style OIDs for many CyberPower UPS units. Output load is often percent; power OID may be Watts or deci-Watts by model — verify with one poll.

templates.label: CyberPower PDU (ePDU typical)
templates.notes: Representative ePDU load OIDs. Table indexes vary by bank/phase — adjust last sub-id after snmpwalk if needed.

templates.label: Vertiv / Geist PDU (typical)
templates.notes: Geist/Vertiv enterprise tree is model-heavy. These OIDs are starting points for many rPDU / IMD units — confirm with vendor MIB for your SKU.

templates.label: Raritan PX / PX2 / PX3 (typical inlet)
templates.notes: PDU2-MIB style inlet active power / current. Index .1 is usually inlet 1. Units are typically Watts and 0.001 A or Amps depending on object — verify after first poll.

templates.label: ServerTech PRO2 / Sentry (typical)
templates.notes: Common Sentry3/PRO2 inlet load OIDs. Confirm against your Sentry MIB revision; indexes differ for multi-inlet units.
